Migrations.Description: Adds Options.TransportMode, Options.DeviceProfile, Options.Pool, Options.Retry, Options.CircuitBreaker. No v1 field removed or reordered. Defaults preserve v1 behavior (TransportMode=TcpNative, Retry.MaxAttempts=1, CircuitBreaker.Enabled=true with a 5-failure threshold that a healthy device will never trip).
Uses the shared Read Options type. New v2 options (Pool/Retry/CircuitBreaker/TransportMode/DeviceProfile) apply at the batch level.
